instance HonoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

]

]

]

]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [

]

]

]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM IFC for building models; MQTT, HTTPS/REST, and JSON schema for IoT communication; adherence to open model‑driven engineering standards (EMF)."
